source.name: ANSYS Fluent v251 two-way intrinsic FSI vertical-flap tutorial

report.pressure_sign_convention: fluid.pressure projection field is sampled directly

scope_limit: selected-formulation coupled smoke; preserves a one-step anchor-injected preflight row and records a true requested five-step coupled smoke row; does not claim 50-step validation; does not claim Fluent parity
